description: Synthetic V3 demo goals for autonomy and readiness validation.

goals.expected_result: Auditable software result bundle with lineage and limitations.
goals.user_goal: Run a synthetic disease-to-result-bundle workflow using mocked inputs.

goals.expected_result: Review packet for generated small-molecule computational hypotheses.
goals.user_goal: Create generated small-molecule hypotheses in mocked mode and prepare review.

goals.expected_result: Traceable biologics review packet with antibody generation disabled.
goals.user_goal: Run the biologics mocked workflow without generated antibody creation.

goals.expected_result: Dry-run integration mapping review with zero external writes.
goals.user_goal: Run integration sync planning and mapping review without external writes.

goals.expected_result: Co-pilot detects a synthetic result import event and requests approval.
goals.user_goal: Monitor a synthetic campaign event and require approval before replan.
